response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience, current Staff title at re:cinq with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, and prior exposure to high-throughput micro-services at Sociomantic. However, the resume shows weak signal on the core must-haves: Python is absent from the listed skills, and distributed-systems depth is implied rather than demonstrated at scale. Worth a screening conversation to probe Python proficiency and distributed-systems leadership.
strengths: Current Staff-level role with hands-on AI-agent and MCP code-generator experience
Prior high-throughput micro-services exposure (millions of HTTP req/sec at Sociomantic)
Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth and proven testing/craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Python not listed in skills — a must-have for the role
Distributed-systems experience is mentioned but not deeply substantiated at staff-strategy scale
No explicit evidence of stakeholder management, on-call rotation, or cross-functional technical leadership
